manifest.ext.name: envsync-le
manifest.command.settings.title: Open Settings
manifest.command.compare-selected.title: Compare Selected .env Files
manifest.command.set-template.title: Set as Template File
manifest.command.clear-template.title: Clear Template File
manifest.command.show-issues.title: Show Sync Details
manifest.command.ignore-file.title: Ignore File Temporarily
manifest.command.stop-ignoring.title: Stop Ignoring File
manifest.command.clear-all-ignored.title: Clear All Ignored Files
manifest.capability.virtual-workspaces.d: Limited support in virtual workspaces (read-only detection)
manifest.capability.untrusted-workspaces: Limited support in untrusted workspaces (file watching disabled)
manifest.settings.title: envsync-le
manifest.settings.watch-patterns.desc: File patterns to watch for dotenv files
manifest.settings.exclude-patterns.desc: File patterns to exclude from synchronization checks
manifest.settings.statusbar.enabled.desc: Show sync status in status bar
manifest.settings.debounce.desc: Delay in milliseconds before checking sync after file changes
manifest.settings.ignore-comments.desc: Ignore commented lines when parsing dotenv files
manifest.settings.telemetry.desc: Enable local telemetry logging for debugging
manifest.settings.comparison-mode.option: Compare all files against a template file
manifest.settings.compare-only-files.des: List of specific files to compare (manual mode only)
manifest.settings.template-file.desc: Template file to compare all others against (template mode only)
manifest.settings.temporary-ignore.desc: Files to temporarily exclude from comparison
runtime.tooltip.in-sync: All dotenv files are in sync
runtime.tooltip.out-of-sync: Dotenv files out of sync - click for details
runtime.tooltip.error: Error checking dotenv files - click for settings
runtime.picker.select-template: Select .env file to use as template
runtime.message.need-two-files: Please select at least 2 .env files to compare
runtime.message.no-ignored-files: No files are currently being ignored
runtime.message.comparison-complete: Compared {0} files. Check status bar for results.
runtime.message.missing-keys: Some files are missing keys. See status bar.
runtime.message.parse-errors: Some files could not be parsed. See status bar.
runtime.message.template-set: Set {0} as template. All .env files will be compared against it.
runtime.message.template-cleared: Cleared template. Returned to automatic comparison.
runtime.message.file-ignored: Temporarily ignoring {0}. Use "Stop Ignoring" to re-enable.
runtime.message.all-ignored-cleared: Cleared ignore list. All .env files will be checked again.
